profiles.name: 01 Play Pause
profiles.description: Single-button media control. Press to play or pause any media player that responds to the standard media play/pause key (Spotify, Apple Music, VLC, YouTube in a browser, etc.). No configuration required — the key is a universal media shortcut on all platforms.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Delayed Shutter
profiles.description: Hands-free camera trigger with a 3-second countdown. Press the button, step into frame, and the shutter fires. Uses the Volume Up shortcut — works with Google Camera, Open Camera, and most Android camera apps. No app settings needed.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Transport
profiles.description: Two-button DAW transport: Record and Play/Stop. In Ableton Live and Logic Pro the Space bar is Play/Stop and F9 triggers Record by default. Check your DAW preferences under Settings > Keyboard Shortcuts if the defaults differ.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Tracking
profiles.description: Solo-performer recording workflow for Logic Pro on macOS. Button A arms record (R key, default Logic shortcut). Button B starts/stops playback (Space bar). After a bad take, long-press Button A to undo (Cmd+Z). Check Logic Pro > Preferences > Key Commands to verify defaults.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Page Turner
profiles.description: Foot-controlled page turner for digital sheet music apps (forScore, MobileSheets, Adobe Acrobat). Button A goes back one page, Button B advances. Both apps respond to Page Up / Page Down by default — no keyboard shortcut configuration needed.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Camera Remote
profiles.description: Hands-free video and photo control for Google Pixel smartphones. Volume Up triggers the shutter in Google Camera. Button A fires instantly; Button B fires after a 3-second delay so you can step into frame. No app configuration needed.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 VLC Practice
profiles.description: Optimised for the VLC app on smartphones and desktops. Designed for musicians practising along with a recording. Button A plays or pauses. Button B stops playback and resets to the beginning. VLC responds to the standard media keys — no configuration required.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Zoom Controls
profiles.description: Foot-controlled Zoom meeting controls. Button A toggles your microphone (Cmd+Shift+A on macOS, Alt+A on Windows). Button B toggles your camera (Cmd+Shift+V on macOS, Alt+V on Windows). This profile targets macOS — see the 'Windows' profile for the Windows variant. Zoom must be the focused window.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Recording
profiles.description: Three-button podcast recording control for Audacity or REAPER. Button A starts/stops recording (Shift+R in Audacity — enable via Preferences > Recording > Append Record). Button B pauses/resumes (P key in Audacity). Button C mutes/unmutes your system microphone via a global shortcut — assign Ctrl+Shift+M to 'Mute Microphone' in your OS or audio app settings.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 DAW Looper
profiles.description: General-purpose recording and looping profile for Ableton Live. Focuses on the solo-performer workflow where undoing a bad take quickly is essential. Default Ableton shortcuts: F9 = Record, Space = Play/Stop, C = Toggle Metronome. Ctrl+Z (Cmd+Z on macOS) is the global undo shortcut. Check Live > Preferences > Record/Warp/Launch to verify.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Social & Comms
profiles.description: Productivity profile for interacting with Discord, Slack, or Zoom while playing an instrument. Button A types a quick ready-message. Buttons B and C send the Discord/Slack default mute (Ctrl+Shift+M) and deafen (Ctrl+Shift+D) shortcuts — configure these in your app's Keybinds settings. Button D takes a screenshot.
profiles.author: tgd1975

profiles.name: 01 Culling
profiles.description: Speed up photo culling in Adobe Lightroom Classic. Button A flags the current photo as a Pick (P key — default Lightroom shortcut). Button B rejects it (X key). Button C moves to the next photo (Right Arrow). Button D moves to the previous photo (Left Arrow). No configuration needed — all are built-in Lightroom shortcuts.
profiles.author: tgd1975
profiles.tested: macOS 14, Lightroom Classic 13.x / Windows 11, Lightroom Classic 13.x

profiles.name: 01 Scene Switcher
profiles.description: Foot-operated scene switcher for OBS Studio. Uses high-range function keys (F13–F16) to switch scenes or toggle audio without interfering with standard typing. In OBS go to Settings > Hotkeys and bind: Intro Scene → F13, Main Scene → F14, Mute Mic → F15, Start/Stop Stream → F16.
profiles.author: tgd1975
profiles.tested: Windows 11, OBS Studio 30.x / macOS 14, OBS Studio 30.x

profiles.name: 01 Score Navigator
profiles.description: Designed for musicians reading digital sheet music on a tablet or notebook (e.g., forScore, MobileSheets, or Adobe Acrobat). Uses standard navigation keys to turn pages and jump to sections. No app configuration needed — these are universal navigation keys.
profiles.author: tgd1975
profiles.tested: iPad OS 17, forScore 14 / macOS 14, Adobe Acrobat
